# Thermal Equilibrium

**Summary**: The state where the temperature of the rock and fluid are equal.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-david|DAVID, 2016]] modeled both LTE and NOLTE conditions for the thermal flood.

## Scientific Context

- [[2016-david|DAVID, 2016]] Determines whether a single or dual energy equation is required for the simulation.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2016-david|DAVID, 2016]] Mathematical assumption.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Under NOLTE, the rock matrix and fluid phase have separate energy equations. ([[2016-david|DAVID, 2016, p. 54]])
